shows.title: Nancy Guthrie Case / Afterlife Evidence
shows.first_half: First Half: The investigation into the disappearance of 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie remains active. Author and former criminal defense attorney Mark Shaw will review the developments to date, including interactions with law enforcement. He'll examine whether all possible motives behind the abduction have been explored and offer his analysis.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Professor Michael Zigarelli delves into what happens after we die. He argues that there is a surprisingly credible, scientific case that death is not our demise, but a doorway. This, he says, is supported by the thousands who have walked through that door and returned to tell about it.

shows.title: Sasquatch Interactions / Open Lines
shows.first_half: Guest host Connie Willis (info) will be joined by Mike Paterson, a Canadian researcher known for his unconventional and controversial field work in Sasquatch investigations. He'll share detailed accounts of ongoing, direct interactions with a group of beings he identifies as Sasquatch in an undisclosed region of Ontario, Canada. Paterson has documented his experiences through extensive audio recordings, video footage, and other supporting evidence. Followed by Open Lines in the latter half. Give Connie a call and discuss whatever is on your mind!
